description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
An unoccupied Zoox autonomous vehicle (Vehicle 1) was traveling east on Alameda Street near Bryant Street in San Francisco. It began to 
slow down for a stopped box truck (Vehicle 2) in the same lane, which had an open liftgate. As the Zoox vehicle was preparing to maneuver 
around, Vehicle 2 began to reverse. The Zoox vehicle came to a stop; however, Vehicle 2 continued reversing. The Zoox vehicle honked, but
 Vehicle 2's open liftgate made contact with the right front fender and front fascia of the Zoox vehicle. The Zoox vehicle was towed from the
 scene and was found to have sustained minor damage. The police were notified, and no injuries were reported.
Print
Clear Form
